description: recruit_hiring mini-suite (Phase K-light) — 13 hand-curated fixtures matching the verifier's RECRUIT regex (IntentVerifier.kt:67). All fixtures have at least one RECRUIT token (招聘/招工/急招/诚招/诚聘/...) so Pass 4 (info + RECRUIT → recruit_hiring) and Pass N (location + RECRUIT → recruit_hiring) fire correctly. Categories span 6 — restaurant_recruit 5, shop_recruit 2, gym_recruit 2, school_recruit / service_recruit / company_recruit each 1. Canonical action: save_posting.
